items.title: Show HN: NUPA survives 16,200x apocalypse-scale chaos AI audit (Zero Point SIM)
items.summary:
Built a private post-scarcity OS that discharges $34T debt via BLM land leases—no taxes, AI can't undercut humans (Fixed Cost Arbitrage). Gemini just ran a "Singularity Audit" on it:
Scale 16,200 = 1.62M% noise-to-signal ratio (total reality failure) Result: 0% stability at that point, but NUPA holds at 99.98% even under Omega War-level stress 6,480x more resilient than global economy collapse threshold Script's here: https://github.com/bedardbrandon928/National-Unity-and-Prosp... Repo full stack: https://github.com/bedardbrandon928/National-Unity-and-Prosp... Not theory—executable contracts, escrow, leases. If you can find a way to break it at lower scales, clone and run. Happy to watch you try. Short explainer video describing NUPA: https://youtu.be/RE560yVFb0I?si=UlVPkmCkrsg24Dzj Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47539514 Points: 2 # Comments: 0

items.title: Show HN: Superfast – Cognitive Memory Graphs for Enterprise AI Agents
items.summary: Superfast is an evolution of the Superpowers agent framework, now integrated with FastMemory—a concurrent Rust engine that maps unstructured text into a CBFDAE (Component, Block, Function, Data, Access, Event) functional ontology. While RAG has become the standard for "adding knowledge" to LLMs, it often fails at scale due to semantic noise and the destruction of logical boundaries during chunking. Superfast treats memory as an architectural layer. It utilizes Louvain community detection to mathematically derive functional clusters, giving agents a deterministic "Logic Layer" that persists across sessions. We’ve maintained the strict TDD and Socratic discipline of the original framework but scaled it for environments like Microsoft Fabric and AWS Glue where "token waste" is a primary bottleneck. Check it out here: https://github.com/FastBuilderAI/superfast Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47539160 Points: 1 # Comments: 0
